nodes.label: Runtime resilience for dev and CI
add clip query expression indexes migration
falls back to message when detail is absent
returns default envelope when payload is not recognized
identifies APIError and unauthorized APIError instances
serializes query params, auth header, and JSON body
loads API key from session storage when apiKey option is omitted
throws APIError with canonical metadata for non-allowed non-2xx responses
returns payload for explicitly allowed non-2xx statuses
returns structured camera list data for successful responses
returns structured health data for healthy responses
returns payload for accepted non-2xx health states
throws APIError when payload shape is invalid
returns structured setup status data for successful responses
throws APIError when setup status payload is malformed
returns structured preflight data for successful responses
saves, loads, and clears API key values
prefers explicit apiKey and falls back to storage when omitted
encodes clip IDs for media endpoint paths
returns Date for valid timestamp strings
computes preemptive refresh delay from expiry
returns null for unparseable expiry values
returns thrown Error message when available
returns fallback message for unknown failures
renders empty state when no cameras are configured
submits create camera payload from form values
returns explicit port from fully-qualified xaddr
returns explicit port from xaddr even when scheme is omitted
falls back to protocol default when xaddr has no explicit port
returns valid JSON templates for every backend option
rejects JSON arrays because source config must be an object
parses JSON object payloads used for camera create requests
rejects patch payloads that include redacted placeholders
accepts patch payloads with null clears and replacement values
drops redacted values from camera source config defaults
renders canonical API errors with error_code suffix
returns unhealthy when runtime state is failed
returns degraded while reload is in progress
returns healthy for idle runtime even when last reload had an error
formats ISO runtime timestamps for operator readability
returns fallback for absent runtime timestamp values
renders all configured backend cards and dispatches selected backend id
renders backend picker options before configuration starts
submits RTSP payload through confirm step and closes via onDone
rejects camera names with spaces or special characters
rejects duplicate camera names before sending create request
disables back and cancel while create request is in-flight
maps known API duplicate-name errors to user-friendly message
renders disabled preview state from the hook
wires start, refresh, and stop actions from the preview hook
moves from discovery step to probe step after camera selection
creates camera with injected RTSP credentials
shows unusable-profile guidance when probe returns no stream URIs
swallows start mutation rejections and exposes the failure via hook state
keeps a fresh preview session when the follow-up status refetch fails
does not let an older in-flight status refresh clear a newer preview session
allows one token-based retry when media url is present
rejects refresh once max retry count is reached
resets retry attempts when media source changes
retains retry attempts when media source is unchanged
keeps filter signature scoped while moving across keyset pages
rewinds previous cursor and keeps filters intact
drops stale cursor history when filter signature changes
parses supported filters and normalizes activity_type to lowercase
falls back to defaults for invalid or missing values
defaults missing detected filter to true
parses explicit detected any as no API detected filter
round-trips form state through query and URL params
preserves explicit detected any in route search params
formats APIError with canonical error code
returns fallback text when detected objects are absent
prefers explicit view_url over storage_uri when both are present
returns null for non-http storage handles
returns null for non-http view_url schemes
renders nothing while setup redirect state is still checking
shows a Re-run setup link during normal dashboard rendering
renders database backup status and triggers manual backup
maps known backend statuses to matching UI tones
maps unknown statuses to unknown tone
returns placeholder text for empty timestamps
updates minimum risk threshold for alert policy baseline
toggles VLM section and coerces run mode to trigger-only when enabled
emits model and trigger-class updates from the form
updates minimum confidence from slider input
hydrates defaults when step data is missing
normalizes malformed step payloads and coerces enabled VLM run_mode
returns validation errors for invalid filter and VLM state
builds finalized step payload with normalized classes and trimmed VLM config
emits null VLM payload when VLM is disabled
builds alert-policy threshold from selected minimum risk level
does not require extra alert-policy validation for enabled notifiers
emits mqtt config updates for host and topic template
parses mqtt port input changes as numbers
parses comma-separated recipients into notifier config array
redirects to setup route when setup state is fresh
does not redirect when setup state is partial or complete
does not redirect when setup state is complete
does not redirect when setup status query fails
does not redirect when wizard progress exists in localStorage
reports checking state while setup status query is pending
renders progress indicator and marks the active step
disables Back on the first step
hides Skip button for non-skippable steps
routes Exit to Dashboard link to root path
invokes back, skip, and next callbacks from footer actions
hides Next button when requested by caller
parses camera draft object from wizard step payload
parses storage draft only for supported storage backends
parses detection draft only when filter/vlm shape is valid
parses notification draft only when notifier and alert policy shapes are valid
starts at step zero when no URL step and no persisted state exist
goNext and goBack update step index and URL search param
goToStep navigates directly to a known step id
goBack at step zero is a no-op
skipStep advances and marks current step as skipped without completion
persists and restores state across hook instances
reset clears state and removes persisted wizard storage
stores camera draft and completes setup step when flow succeeds
maps flow cancel to step skip callback
renders failure details with alert text
saves storage config and advances step on valid input
maps skip button to wizard skip callback
builds storage test request from active backend selection
emits mqtt notifier and alert policy payload on save
maps skip button to wizard skip callback
renders validation error when notifier config is invalid
hydrates notifier and alert-policy threshold from initial step data
renders welcome copy and run-checks action
runs preflight on click and renders pass/fail badges
calls onComplete when mark-step-complete is clicked
saves default detection config with VLM disabled
enables VLM and emits trigger-only run mode by default
maps skip button to wizard skip callback
renders summary cards and routes edit actions by step id
launches setup and transitions to started state when pipeline health becomes ready
surfaces precheck errors and skips launch polling
appends canonical error code when available
formats APIError instances via shared API formatter
returns default message for non-Error values
moves through configure steps, test, and confirm in order
moves backward from confirm to test to configure and picker
handles zero backend-step count without invalid indices
does not move backward from backend picker stage
updates host and port values while preserving sibling ftp fields
renders RTSP fields and emits updated config values on change
updates watch directory and numeric polling settings
collapses wizard after stream resolution and allows reopening
switches backend and resets config to backend defaults
emits config changes from active backend form
renders camera step component on wizard camera stage
advances to storage and keeps camera draft out of localStorage on completion
skips camera step and marks progress as skipped when camera flow is canceled
renders detection step component on wizard detection stage
renders notification step component on wizard notifications stage
renders review step component on wizard review stage
builds finalize payload from available wizard drafts
